title: Aisu
description: A Winter themed texture pack made for 1.8.9 pvp !
body:
Aisu [16x] is a winter themed texture pack made for 1.8.9.


It can be used overall in all the version as it's the first ever pack in witch i've done all the textures smh (yeah no vanilla textures in this one, hell yeah !)


I'll probably update some textures in the future as i ain't quite satisfied with some blocks apperence but still, here's the first release !


Here some screenshots of ingame uses of the pack !


![Aisu 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b62f53661281d9c91b424939282a659e6281266.jpeg)

![Aisu 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c1f9e6dd0c00ba46b3bbc609295692ca11cd33c.jpeg)

![Aisu 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a31ef1c7b73841d7c397326118617dbfb237cde0.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
